outcome_definition: uhrswork values between 1 and 98 treated as usual hours; outcome = hours >= 35
sample_selection: Hispanic-Mexican detailed origin codes {100, 102, 103, 104, 105, 106, 107} and birthplace code 200 (Mexico)
Noncitizens (citizen == 2) aged 18-34 with positive person weights
Birth year >= 1982, arrival year <= 2007, and age at arrival < 16
